props.ChoiceText: A cramped note in the margin overturned the page around it, and you spent the night realizing what someone had tried to hide.
props.ChoiceBio: A marginal revelation taught you that the most dangerous sentence on a page is not always the largest.

0.TransitionText: Because a marginal revelation taught you that small notes can hide large dangers, it carried you into occult study.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a marginal revelation taught you that the most dangerous sentence on a page is not always the largest, you chased hidden correspondences, and that led toward alchemy.

2.TransitionText: Because a marginal revelation taught you that the most dangerous sentence on a page is not always the largest, scholarship could harden into forbidden belief as a heretic.
